strategy: He only has 4,250 health - race to kill him before the end of round 4, when he Polymorphs into Mister Hound and the fight changes.
Round 1 he casts Balefrost, a global that boosts Ice damage; it mainly powers his own hits, so keep an Ice shield up and do not stall.
Stack a blade or two and a Feint, then hit with Fire (he is Ice) inside the first three rounds.
If you cannot finish by round 4 he becomes Mister Hound and lays a +35% Fire Damage global - shield Fire and keep hitting.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he lays Balefrost, an Ice-damage global. It buffs his Ice attacks, so keep an Ice shield up.
At the end of round 4 (and every 4th round after) he Polymorphs into Mister Hound and adds a +35% Fire Damage global. Kill him before this or shield Fire after.
